payload.answer: The time reference is ambiguous: "last Friday" is relative to when Sam said it, and "next month" is relative to that same date. I can help by offering repair options rather than committing a memory update.
citations: Input: "Sam said last Friday that he is leaving Goldman next month."
repair_options: Record the statement as dated relative to Sam's speaking time: Sam said on last Friday that he would leave Goldman the following month.
If you want a calendar-anchored version, specify the actual date of "last Friday" before saving.
Keep the statement as-is but mark the timing as relative/ambiguous.
Store two separate temporal references: one for when Sam said it, and one for when he expected to leave.
